prompt: Add verbose routing-table view with inactive Direct routes
note: Added show ip routing-table verbose with combined Direct and Static VRP-style records, persistent route ages, and inactive Direct candidates retained in RIB but excluded from active Radix/FIB forwarding; protocol direct now displays inactive entries too. 301 tests pass.
decisions: Represent Direct eligibility explicitly so inactive routes remain observable without becoming forwarding routes
Generate verbose output from persistent RM state rather than synthesizing route status during display
